4036.issue: [S4036] Consider adding .vscode/settings.json file with JSON schema definitions for better development experience with Visual Studio Code.

5023.issue: [S5023] "package-lock.json" not found in repo! Please consider to commit it to github repository.

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (main.js, src/main.ts). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.welcome/blob/master/io-package.json).

8905.issue: [W8905] Repository contains [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.welcome/blob/master/package.json) files in non-root directories (e.g. /src-admin/package.json, /src-www/package.json), but no npm dependabot entry matches affected directories. Add matching "directory" or "directories" entries.

8906.issue: [S8906] Some Dependabot entries ("github-actions", "npm", "npm") use "schedule: interval: monthly". Consider migrating to random cron schedule ("schedule: interval: cron") for load distribution.

8908.issue: [S8908] Dependabot entry for "npm" has "open-pull-requests-limit: 5". A limit of at least 15 is recommended.

8913.issue: [S8913] No automerge workflow for dependabot PRs found. Consider setting up automerging by adding ".github/workflows/automerge-dependabot.yml".

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/src") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

9006.issue: [S9006] .commitinfo file should be excluded by .gitignore, please add a line with text ".commitinfo" to .gitignore

9507.issue: [E9507] i18n directory "src-www/src/i18n" found in repository but is not included in [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.welcome/blob/master/package.json) "files". Translations will be missing from the npm package.

0029.issue: [E0029] Node.js 20 is required as minimum, node.js 22 is recommended. Please change "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '16' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.welcome/blob/master/package.json).

0036.issue: [E0036] @alcalzone/release-script-plugin-license 4.0.0 specified. 5.2.0 is required as minimum,  5.2.0 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.welcome/blob/master/package.json)

0065.issue: [S0065] No devDependency for "@types/node" found. Consider adding "@types/node":">=16" to devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.welcome/blob/master/package.json).

0051.issue: [W0051] "maintainers" attribute at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.welcome/blob/master/package.json) is not documented. Please use "contributors" attribute.

0063.issue: [W0063] "chai, chai-as-promised, mocha, sinon-chai" are included by "@iobroker/testing". Remove from devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.welcome/blob/master/package.json)

0069.issue: [W0069] The following dependencies require a node.js version incompatible with the adapter's minimum (node 16): body-parser (requires node: ">=18"), content-disposition (requires node: ">=18"), express (requires node: ">= 18"), finalhandler (requires node: ">= 18.0.0"), merge-descriptors (requires node: ">=18"), mime-types (requires node: ">=18"), router (requires node: ">= 18"), send (requires node: ">= 18"), serve-static (requires node: ">= 18"), type-is (requires node: ">= 18") and 1 more. Please increase the engines.node requirement at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.welcome/blob/master/package.json) or update/replace the incompatible dependencies.
